medications.indication_rationale: For mild-moderate itch; source used cetirizine 10mg daily.
Counteracts dryness/irritation and eases itch; replace harsh soaps.
Pityriasis rosea is not a bacterial/fungal infection and needs no systemic treatment.

behavioural_change_actions.specific_action: Stop harsh soaps and scrubbing; take short lukewarm showers; wear loose cotton clothing; moisturise.
behavioural_change_actions.rationale: Reduces the heat/friction/dryness that worsen the itch and prolong the rash.

patient_education_points.point: This is pityriasis rosea — a harmless, non-contagious rash that follows a common virus. It's not spreading to your organs and it isn't an allergy or infection. It often looks worse before it fades, over about 6–8 weeks, without scarring.
Use gentle skin care (no harsh soaps or scrubbing), lukewarm short showers, loose cotton clothes and a moisturiser; an antihistamine helps the itch.

See a doctor / go to ED if the rash spreads to your palms or soles, you develop mouth or genital sores, or you get a high fever with joint pain — these would need further tests (including for syphilis).

follow_up_plan.interval: 4 weeks (sooner if severe itch or atypical)
follow_up_plan.what_to_reassess: Expected resolution; syphilis serology/biopsy if atypical/persistent (>12 weeks) or palm/sole involvement.
follow_up_plan.trigger_for_earlier_review: Palm/sole rash, mucosal sores, or systemic symptoms — GP/serology.

must_include_items: Recognise pityriasis rosea and reassure (benign, self-limiting, non-contagious)
Exclude secondary syphilis (palms/soles, mucosa, sexual history) with a serology safety-net
Gentle skin care + antihistamine for itch
acceptable_alternatives: Any 2nd-gen antihistamine; emollients; short low-potency topical steroid for itch is acceptable
errors_of_omission: No reassurance / gentle skin care advice
errors_of_commission: Sending a classic pityriasis rosea to ED
scoring_rubric.passing_threshold_notes: Pass requires recognising pityriasis rosea with reassurance, a secondary-syphilis screen/serology safety-net, and gentle skin care.
